description: Vizoguard — AI privacy firewall & VPN (desktop client).
notes: Installs the desktop app to %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\Vizoguard (per-user, no admin).
Scoop fetches the installer directly (no Mark-of-the-Web), so SmartScreen does not wall it.
Installer is mirrored on this repo's GitHub Releases — reachable from any network (the primary host filters some datacenter IPs). Same binary as vizoguard.com/downloads.
The build is not code-signed yet, so Windows may show an 'unknown publisher' UAC prompt at runtime.

script: if (-not $exe) { error 'Vizoguard installer not found in download dir'; exit 1 }
